positive: An intricate, detailed silhouette of a majestic nocturnal owl sitting on a gothic branch, surrounded by stylized, bioluminescent flora and celestial constellations. The composition must be central and highly contrasting, featuring deep indigo and black background tones contrasted sharply with electric teal, emerald green, and brilliant gold accents. Focus on clean lines, geometric patterns incorporated into the foliage and stars, and a strong 'mythic forest' aesthetic. The print should feel suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, utilizing negative space effectively. Intricate detail, woodcut engraving style merged with modern digital linework, high contrast, vibrant saturation, centered, perfect silhouette.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, blurry, amateur, logo, trademark, cartoon, realism, photographic, gradient
